rooms.name: Tower Cell
rooms.description: A cramped stone cell at the top of a lonely tower. A magic ladder hums with soft blue light.

items.name: a rusty iron trapdoor
items.locked_description: A rusty iron trapdoor in the middle of the floor. The trap door is closed and locked.
items.closed_description: A rusty iron trapdoor in the middle of the floor. The trap door is closed.
items.open_description: A rusty iron trapdoor in the middle of the floor. The trap door is open.

boxes.open_description: A brown greasy lunch bag sits here with its top folded open.
boxes.closed_description: A brown greasy lunch bag sits here with its top folded shut.

items.name: a cheery orange carrot
items.eat_success_string: THE CHEERY ORANGE CARROT SCREAMS AS YOU FORCE IT DOWN YOUR HIDEOUS THROAT. HIS SCREAMS DIE OUT TO A GURGLE AS HE IS DRIVEN INTO THE PIT OF YOUR GREEDY STOMACH.
items.eat_missing_string: YOU HAVE NO CARROT! ARE YOU TRYING TO CONFUSE ME?

items.name: a battered and dull brass lamp
items.rubbed_name: a battered but shiny brass lamp
items.rub_success_string: The lamp grows shiny from rubbing.
items.rub_minigame_tease: The air fills with smoke. After it clears you cannot believe your eyes: a Genie has appeared before your very eyes. He mutters some words, 'MYPCLY JUBURUAY MIT DE NURDY SMUDY DIGNIC PIC?' and looks at you inquiringly. This means (in magic Arabic), 'I will grant you one wish.'

rooms.name: Blank Chamber
rooms.description: An oddly blank room with smooth stone walls. There is nothing here.
rooms.dark_description: It is pitch dark. You can't see anything.

rooms.name: Colossal Cave
rooms.description: A colossal cave opens before you, its jewel-studded walls shimmering in your torch light. A large crystal blue pool lies in the middle, and a massive gold bar rests near the water.

rooms.name: Pool Ledge
rooms.description: You stand on a narrow ledge across the pool.

rooms.name: Demo Landing
rooms.description: You emerge into Demo Land on a floating stone platform. A ladder opening leads down into the tower cell below.

rooms.name: Whispering Grove
rooms.description: Tall silver trees lean close and seem to murmur old secrets whenever the wind shifts.

rooms.name: Mirror Hall
rooms.description: A long hall of black glass reflects scenes that do not quite match your movements.

rooms.name: Clockwork Court
rooms.description: Bronze gears turn beneath crystal floor panels, ticking in perfect rhythm with distant bells.

rooms.name: Lantern Overlook
rooms.description: Hundreds of hanging lanterns drift over a sheer drop, painting moving constellations in the mist.
